sessions.lever: Stub created from the obsolete worker branch work/blkB2-0614 (commit e1f215db, 2026-06-14, Trenton). On the branch, this candidate.c form scored sandbox 0 + SHA1==oracle (cheat-reviewer PASS). On main, the standing memory [[stranded-branch-work-not-transplantable]] proved a byte-identical version of THIS function scores 19 due to compilation-context drift (~70+ commits of header/type/per-file state). Source-identical-different-score is the empirical case the memory was written from. The technique may still apply via a derivative form; the diff is a worthwhile starting hint.

reviewer.evidence: No candidate adopted on main. The branch commit e1f215db is a hint, not a transplantable match. The branch's cheat-reviewer PASS only applies in the branch's compilation context.

remaining_gap.summary: Branch commit e1f215db on work/blkB2-0614 (2026-06-14) closes the function in the branch's context via two edits: (1) drop the `register s16 *s0 asm("s0")` + `register u32 *s1 asm("s1")` pins + the `asm("" : : "r"(s1))` barrier; (2) hoist `s2 = a1 - 1;` out of the `if (a1 != 0)` block to BEFORE the early-exit guard. The hoist makes cc1 fill the branch delay slot of `beqz a1` with `addiu s2,a1,-1` (computed unconditionally), so `move s1,a2` materializes in the prologue paired with its `sw s1` save — matching target's prologue. On main, the same source diff scores 19 (context drift).
remaining_gap.rules_required_for_full_match: 0 (no regfix rules carried by this function; the cheat was source-level pins + barrier)

Inspect the per-file compilation context for code6cac_c2: what's changed in the headers (`include/code6cac.h`?) or in adjacent function bodies that might affect the GCC's view of s0/s1/s2 liveness? The drift is real and measurable; if a specific header change can be pinned as the cause, that might suggest a structural workaround.

Check the sibling functions in code6cac_c2.c that DID get COMPLETED-C in June (look at b3165e38's queue-done sweep or commits referencing the file in mid-June). Their completion may have involved a similar loop-counter-hoist or prologue-fix retire — those bodies are the most relevant analogs available in main's current context.
